params.name: Doppler radar
params.description:
On Mar 5, 1842 AD, Doppler first proposed the idea of radar.
Based on the Doppler effect he discovered, Doppler proposed the idea of radar: by emitting pulsed waves of a fixed frequency to scan an area, when encountering a moving target, the relative speed of the target can be measured by the frequency difference between the echo and the transmitted wave, and the distance of the target can be measured by the time difference. About a century later, Doppler radar was successfully developed and …
